title: Bhagavad Gita, Chapter 11: The Vision of the Universal Form
description: Chapter 11 of the Bhagavad Gita: Arjuna sees Krishna's cosmic form — all of reality in one infinite body — and is terrified.
introduction: Chapter 11 of the Bhagavad Gita: Arjuna sees Krishna's cosmic form — all of reality in one infinite body — and is terrified.

translation.text: If the light of a thousand suns were to blaze all at once in the sky, that would be like the splendor of that great soul.
